svg.text: A guiding star rising above the horizon,
symbolizing intelligence, direction and limitless potential.
Clear space (x) = Height of the star. No text or graphics should enter this area.
Minimum size ensures clarity and legibility.

g.text: Do not place on busy backgrounds
The rising star above the horizon represents guidance,
intelligence and exploration. The arc signifies the horizon
of possibilities, while the star reflects clarity and purpose.
Together, they form a mark of trust, growth and limitless
